ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each party (uuid) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the party */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the party */,
  "row_creation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the party record was created */,
  "row_update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the party record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the party is active or not */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of party (individual, organization) */,
  "legal_name" TEXT /* Legal name of the organization */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_names" (
  "party_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party name */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "name_type" TEXT /* Type of name (e.g., full name, alias) */,
  "name_value" TEXT /* Value of the name */,
  "name_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the name became effective */,
  "name_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the name will expire (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_names_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_addresses" (
  "party_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party address */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., mailing, residential) */,
  "address_value" TEXT /* Value of the address */,
  "address_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the address became effective */,
  "address_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the address will expire (if applicable) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_addresses_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_contacts" (
  "party_contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party contact */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Value of the contact */,
  "contact_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact information became effective */,
  "contact_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact information will expire (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_contacts_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_roles" (
  "party_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party role */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., employee, customer) */,
  "role_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the role became effective */,
  "role_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the role will expire (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_roles_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_relationships" (
  "party_relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party relationship */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "related_party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the related party */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child, sibling) */,
  "relationship_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship became effective */,
  "relationship_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship will expire (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_relationships_related_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_relationships_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_associations" (
  "party_association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party association */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "associated_party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated party */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., employee-employer) */,
  "association_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the association became effective */,
  "association_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the association will expire (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_associations_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_associations_associated_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("associated_party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_parties" (
  "user_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-party relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the context of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_parties_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_parties_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_history" (
  "party_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_history_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_documents" (
  "party_document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party document */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., ID, passport) */,
  "document_value" TEXT /* Value of the document */,
  "document_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the document became effective */,
  "document_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the document will expire (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_documents_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_notes" (
  "party_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party note */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "note_value" TEXT /* Value of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_notes_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_tags" (
  "party_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party tag */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Reference to the party */,
  "tag_value" TEXT /* Value of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., department, project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_tags_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)
